Video.summary: Experience the high-octane intensity as Round 6 of Monster Jam Fast Track takes over the iconic AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas. Watch as 12 world-class athletes, including icons like Tristan England in JCB Digatron and Adam Anderson in Grave Digger, push their 12,000-pound machines to the limit across three grueling competitions. The stakes are higher than ever in the JCB Racing bracket, where mechanical drama—like smoke pouring from Mike Pagliarulo’s Excalibur—threatens to derail championship dreams. From the technical precision of the Skills Challenge to the gravity-defying backflips of Freestyle, the "Home of the Dallas Cowboys" provides the ultimate stage for raw power and fearless rivalries.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2009 season continues with epic freestyle action from Angel Stadium of Anaheim, on January 10, 2009.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the thrilling Monster Jam racing action from Gillette Stadium on June 20, 2015!
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing

Video.summary: Tonight, the showdown between your favorite trucks and drivers continues with more epic racing action from Trans World Dome in St. Louis.
Video.title: Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2001 season revs back into the Superdome in New Orleans with freestyle chaos.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Orlando Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2011.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from EverBank Field, on March 3, 2012.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes wild at the Alamodome in San Antonio on January 12, 2008.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into M&T Bank Stadium, on June 2, 2012 with all your favorite trucks and drivers!
Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Image.alt: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue returns to NRG Stadium for another action-packed round. Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson tries to win his second consecutive Overall Event Championship while Grave Digger driver Tyler Menninga looks to continue his racing dominance as he goes for 18-racing wins in a row. Find out when Monster Jam heads back to Houston for Round 6.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Former Triple Threat Series Champion Colton Eichelberger returns to Monster Jam looking to lead Max D to another freestyle win, but his old rival Tyler Menninga leads the series and attempts to pilot Grave Digger to another event win. Former Rookie of the Year, Nick Pagliarulo returns to Kraken for his series premiere as Stadium Championship Series East heads to Tampa.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: It's 2005 and it's showtime! Check out the racing action from Olympic Stadium, on October 30, 2004.
Video.title: Olympic Stadium - Montreal, Quebec - Racing

Video.summary: Experience the thrills of Monster Jam's racing and freestyle action from the Edward Jones Dome on February 7, 2014.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Day two in East Rutherford continues at MetLife stadium with the freestyle competition.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle

MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss your favorite trucks and drivers as they compete in racing at the Metrodome in Minneapolis.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes to Holland for a series of competitions from the Gelredome, on September 29, 2012.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Holland

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East begins the road to World Finals XXIII at the Alamodome. Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga begins defense of his series championship while Tristan England debuts the newest truck in the Monster Jam fleet, JCB Digatron. Max D’s Tom Meents kicks-off his final competitive season.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Louisiana Superdome on January 31, 2009.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss all the Monster Jam racing and freestyle excitement from Chase Field on January 26, 2013.
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ

Video.summary: Houston's Astrodome is the setting for tonight's racing competition between all of your favorite trucks and drivers during the 2001 season of Monster Jam!
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: 14 Monster Jam superstars duke it out for the top spots in racing and two wheel skills.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing and Two-Wheel

MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing and Two-Wheel

Video.summary: Your favorite Monster Jam trucks and drivers bring the excitement into Orlando, FL with racing, skills, and freestyle action.
Video.title: Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: It's Primetime in St. Louis as Stadium Championship East continues for Round 5.
Video.title: The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis

Image.alt: The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis
The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis
The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis

Video.summary: He is vengeance... he is the night... he is the Batman Monster Jam truck! Experience the ultimate tribute to Gotham's Caped Crusader with the BEST freestyle runs and jaw-dropping stunts captured. This compilation proves why The Dark Knight is the hero Monster Jam deserves!
Video.title: Batman Highlights Compilation

Video.summary: Don't miss the best of Monster Jam's flips, destruction, and saves.
Video.title: Best of Flips, Destruction, and Saves

Image.alt: Best of Flips, Destruction, and Saves
Best of Flips, Destruction, and Saves
Best of Flips, Destruction, and Saves

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season zooms into Ford Field in Detroit, MI with more fun!
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: The road to the Monster Jam World Finals starts here! Tune in LIVE as the top Monster Jam drivers learn if they’ve earned a spot in the 2026 Monster Jam World Finals. Don’t miss the official selection reveal, surprises, and exclusive moments leading into the biggest event in Monster Jam.
Video.title: LIVE: Monster Jam World Finals Selection Show - 5/11/2026

Image.alt: LIVE: Monster Jam World Finals Selection Show - 5/11/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam World Finals Selection Show - 5/11/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam World Finals Selection Show - 5/11/2026

Video.summary: The dirt is ready and the engines are roaring as Monster Jam takes over loanDepot park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 8. Witness the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series East as drivers battle across three intense stages: JCB Racing, the Skills Challenge, and Freestyle. Rivals like Adam Anderson and Tristan England look to defend their dominance, while fierce competitors like Jamie Sullivan and Chris Koehler push their 1,500-horsepower machines to the absolute edge to claim the BKT overall event championship. Don't miss a second of the gravity-defying stunts and heart-pounding action in this electric stadium environment.
Video.title: loanDepot Park - Miami, FL
